# PIPEX Demo Dataset

This folder contains a complete demonstration dataset for **PIPEX**, together with the analysis outputs generated using the recommended workflow.

The demo is intended for new users who would like to explore PIPEX before analyzing their own multiplexed imaging data.

## Contents

* **data/** – Multiplexed pancreatic cancer tissue images used as input for the analysis.
* **analysis/** – Example outputs generated by PIPEX, including cell segmentation, single-cell measurements, clustering results, and quality control files.
* **tutorial/** – Step-by-step guide describing how to reproduce the analysis using the PIPEX graphical user interface.

## What you will learn

Using this demo, you will learn how to:

* prepare a multiplexed imaging dataset for analysis,
* perform cell segmentation,
* quantify protein expression at single-cell resolution,
* identify cell populations using unsupervised clustering,
* export results for interactive visualization in TissUUmaps and QuPath.

## Recommended workflow

1. Open the demo dataset in PIPEX.
2. Follow the instructions in the tutorial.
3. Compare your results with the provided example outputs.
4. Apply the same workflow to your own dataset.

## Notes

The parameters used for this demonstration were optimized for the included pancreatic cancer tissue core and are provided throughout the tutorial. For most datasets, only the nuclei marker, membrane marker, nuclei diameter, membrane diameter, and measured markers need to be adjusted. All other parameters can typically be left at their default values.

For detailed documentation of all PIPEX modules and advanced options, please refer to the main repository documentation.
